channel.title: The Dataset Index
channel.description: The living index of data-centric AI tooling — labeling, synthetic data, curation, augmentation, dataset frameworks.

item.title: HumanSignal/label-studio — momentum 87
item.description: Label Studio is a multi-type data labeling and annotation tool with standardized output format

item.title: dolthub/dolt — momentum 86
item.description: Dolt – Git for Data

item.title: huggingface/datasets — momentum 85
item.description: 🤗 The largest hub of ready-to-use datasets for AI models with fast, easy-to-use and efficient data manipulation tools

item.title: stefan-jansen/machine-learning-for-trading — momentum 85
item.description: Code for Machine Learning for Trading, 3rd edition — from data sourcing to live execution.

item.title: joke2k/faker — momentum 85
item.description: Faker is a Python package that generates fake data for you.

item.title: cvat-ai/cvat — momentum 84
item.description: Computer Vision Annotation Tool (CVAT) is a leading platform for building high-quality visual datasets for vision AI. It offers open-source, cloud, and enterprise products, as well as labeling services, for image, video, and 3D annotation with AI-assisted labeling, quality assurance, team collaborat

item.title: hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset — momentum 84
item.description: 1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPress app.

item.title: treeverse/dvc — momentum 83
item.description: 🦉 Data Versioning and ML Experiments

item.title: voxel51/fiftyone — momentum 82
item.description: Refine high-quality datasets and visual AI models

item.title: simonw/datasette — momentum 81
item.description: An open source multi-tool for exploring and publishing data

item.title: datajuicer/data-juicer — momentum 79
item.description: Data processing for and with foundation models! 🍎 🍋 🌽 ➡️ ➡️🍸 🍹 🍷

item.title: NVIDIA/DALI — momentum 78
item.description: A GPU-accelerated library containing highly optimized building blocks and an execution engine for data processing to accelerate deep learning training and inference applications.

item.title: treeverse/lakeFS — momentum 78
item.description: lakeFS - Data version control for your data lake | Git for data

item.title: argilla-io/argilla — momentum 77
item.description: Argilla is a collaboration tool for AI engineers and domain experts to build high-quality datasets

item.title: lk-geimfari/mimesis — momentum 77
item.description: Mimesis is a Python library for generating fake but realistic data in multiple languages and locales.

item.title: torchgeo/torchgeo — momentum 77
item.description: TorchGeo: datasets, samplers, transforms, and pre-trained models for geospatial data

item.title: tensorflow/datasets — momentum 76
item.description: TFDS is a collection of datasets ready to use with TensorFlow, Jax, ...

item.title: sdv-dev/SDV — momentum 76
item.description: Synthetic data generation for tabular data

item.title: OpenCSGs/csghub — momentum 75
item.description: CSGHub is a brand-new open-source platform for managing LLMs, developed by the OpenCSG team. It offers both open-source and on-premise/SaaS solutions, with features comparable to Hugging Face. Gain full control over the lifecycle of LLMs, datasets, and agents, with Python SDK compatibility with Hugg

item.title: argilla-io/distilabel — momentum 75
item.description: Distilabel is a framework for synthetic data and AI feedback for engineers who need fast, reliable and scalable pipelines based on verified research papers.

item.title: logpai/loghub — momentum 75
item.description: A large collection of system log datasets for AI-driven log analytics [ISSRE'23]

item.title: isl-org/Open3D-ML — momentum 74
item.description: An extension of Open3D to address 3D Machine Learning tasks

item.title: hitsz-ids/synthetic-data-generator — momentum 73
item.description: SDG is a specialized framework designed to generate high-quality structured tabular data.

item.title: TorchIO-project/torchio — momentum 73
item.description: Medical imaging processing for AI applications.

item.title: snorkel-team/snorkel — momentum 72
item.description: A system for quickly generating training data with weak supervision

item.title: synthetichealth/synthea — momentum 72
item.description: Synthetic Patient Population Simulator

item.title: yatengLG/ISAT_with_segment_anything — momentum 72
item.description: Labeling tool with SAM(segment anything model),supports SAM, SAM2, SAM3, sam-hq, MobileSAM EdgeSAM etc.交互式半自动图像标注工具

item.title: pydata/pandas-datareader — momentum 71
item.description: Extract data from a wide range of Internet sources into a pandas DataFrame.

item.title: unsplash/datasets — momentum 71
item.description: 🎁 7,400,000+ Unsplash images made available for research and machine learning

item.title: JuliaData/DataFrames.jl — momentum 71
item.description: In-memory tabular data in Julia
